name: Catalyst Personal

connectors.label: Manual Capture
connectors.notes: Text-first workflow capture is live inside JARVIS.

connectors.label: Gmail
connectors.notes: Personal Gmail triage wiring will come later.

connectors.label: Google Calendar
connectors.notes: Personal calendar sync is intentionally deferred until credentials are wired.

connectors.label: Local Memory And Notes
connectors.notes: Catalyst can already use locally captured signals, memory, and workflow runs.

workflowNotes: Run as a specialist backend under JARVIS rather than as a separate persona.
Keep the workflow personal, local-first, and explicit about disconnected systems.
Prefer manual capture and local notes until personal mail and calendar are wired.
personalDataPolicy: Store only local workflow artifacts and user-provided signals.
